notes: Compound noun: Geld (money) + Strafe (punishment/penalty). Used for financial penalties imposed by courts or authorities.

sentences.german: Er musste eine hohe Geldstrafe zahlen, weil er zu schnell gefahren war.
sentences.english: He had to pay a large fine because he had been driving too fast.

sentences.german: Das Gericht verhängte eine Geldstrafe von 500 Euro.
sentences.english: The court imposed a fine of 500 euros.
